svg.style: background: #ffffff; background-color: light-dark(#ffffff, var(--ge-dark-color, #121212)); color-scheme: light dark;

path.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(16, 115, 158), rgb(84, 169, 206)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(16, 115, 158), rgb(84, 169, 206));
fill: light-dark(rgb(16, 115, 158), rgb(84, 169, 206)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(16, 115, 158), rgb(84, 169, 206));
fill: light-dark(rgb(16, 115, 158), rgb(84, 169, 206)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(16, 115, 158), rgb(84, 169, 206));
fill: light-dark(rgb(177, 221, 240), rgb(23, 61, 77)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(16, 115, 158), rgb(84, 169, 206));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 198px; height: 1px; padding-top: 72px; margin-left: 431px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #000000;

display: inline-block; font-size: 12px; font-family: "Helvetica"; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; font-weight: bold; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(177, 221, 240), rgb(23, 61, 77)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(16, 115, 158), rgb(84, 169, 206));
